page: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_cc_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DCADCCV5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 7763 processor, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. Local storage is bundled, consisting of a 2458 GB local disk, and the instance is capable of utilizing Premium Storage.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities. The server achieves top 25% results in stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Passmark CPU score, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory performance is highly competitive, with the Passmark memory score placing in the top 10% tier, and small-block cached read-only memory bandwidth reaching 4184.42 GB/sec. However, uncached large-block read and write memory bandwidths fall into the average range. Cryptographic operations are accelerated via hardware flags such as AES and VAES, yielding strong performance in Passmark CPU encryption tests.

This hardware profile is well-suited for database workloads, as evidenced by strong Passmark database operations and Redis SET performance. It is also capable of handling image processing, ray tracing, and moderate LLM inference, though text generation for large 70B models is a notable bottleneck, performing in the bottom 25%. Given the high density of dedicated AMD EPYC cores, balanced memory allocation, and substantial local storage, this server offers a cost-efficient resource profile for enterprise applications, database hosting, and multi-threaded data processing without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware.
description: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_cc_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores running at 3.525 GHz. It features 256.0 GB of RAM and a bundled 2458 GB local disk with Premium Storage capabilities. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance delivers strong multi-core CPU performance and top-tier memory scores, as demonstrated by its top 10% Passmark memory benchmark. While single-core and large-block memory bandwidth benchmarks are average, its cryptographic and database performance are highly competitive. The server is optimized for database operations, Redis deployments, multi-threaded data processing, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring high local storage capacity and balanced compute resources without dedicated GPU acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_cc_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and a 2458 GB local disk, optimized for database and multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_cc_v5 features 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and a 2.4 TB local disk for database and general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A high-density virtual machine combining dedicated AMD EPYC processors, balanced memory, and substantial local storage for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 vCPUs operating at 3.525 GHz
256 GB of system memory paired with a 2458 GB local disk
Top 10% Passmark memory score and strong multi-core processing
Accelerated cryptographic performance via AES and VAES instruction sets
Optimized for database hosting, Redis, and multi-threaded enterprise applications
